questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to calculate the total of a list of integers entered by the user until a sentinel value is entered.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter an integer
  • repeatedly take inputs until the user enters -1
  • add each integer (except -1) to a running total
  • output the final total in an appropriate message
questions.explanation:
Format:
total = 0
num = int(input('Enter a number: '))
while num != -1:
    total += num
    num = int(input('Enter a number: '))
print('Total:', total)
